'''Fasgo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] with red hair.

==Biography==
Fasgo once worked for [[Roa]], and was able to give him and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] information on [[Reck Desh]]'s involvement with the [[Peace Brigade]]. He later was captured by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] along with Roa at the [[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Ord Mantell]] by a [[qworlth skaal]] sucking at the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|''Jubilee Wheel'']], a station orbiting [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] and taken as [[yammosk]]-tending slave aboard the [[Crèche (clustership)|''Crèche'']]. He was killed when the yammosk went into a rage after detecting [[Wurth Skidder]]'s [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] powers.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
